scripts.redirect:dev: set -a; [ -f ./.env ] && . ./.env; set +a; cd apps/redirect-service && bun run dev
scripts.web:dev: set -a; [ -f ./.env ] && . ./.env; set +a; cd apps/management-web && bun run dev
scripts.db:migrate: set -a; [ -f ./.env ] && . ./.env; set +a; cd packages/shared-db && bun run migrate
scripts.test: bun run redirect:test && bun run web:test
scripts.check-all: bun run redirect:format && bun run web:format && bun run redirect:lint && bun run web:lint && bun run db:lint && bun run redirect:typecheck && bun run web:typecheck && bun run db:typecheck && bun run test
